Broken Access Control.note: Covers route/resource authorization and SSRF challenge classes; UI-only discovery remains a later challenge-level gate.

Broken Anti Automation.limitation: CAPTCHA bypass and timing abuse require runtime behavior; static coverage currently reaches only the password-reset overlap.
Broken Anti Automation.note: Keep this mixed category visible until challenge-level inventory separates static and runtime-only items.

Cryptographic Issues.note: Covers reversible coupon logic and JWT/token trust; challenge-level inventory still needs weird-crypto and paywall-specific expectations.

Miscellaneous.limitation: Scoreboard, privacy-policy acknowledgement, notification clearing, and CSAF discovery are runtime or non-vulnerability product goals, not static code-path vulnerabilities yet.

Observability Failures.note: Covers log/file exposure and metrics fetch paths; leaked-log semantics should become a challenge-level expectation.

Security Misconfiguration.limitation: Deprecated-interface, error-handling, support-login, and SVG imaging need explicit security-misconfiguration taxonomy before this category can be called fully covered.

Security through Obscurity.limitation: Obfuscated route discovery and steganography require asset/UI analysis beyond the current static code graph.
